creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Dessert Cafe @cafebe.k in Dubai Festival City is a go-to summer spot for cool and refreshing treats! 

What we had:
* Watermelon Kakigori - smooth shaved ice topped with watermelon balls and sweet creamy milk. So refreshing! This is the cafe’s specialty dessert, and it’s truly a must-try.
* Honey Mango Shibuya Toast - freshly baked toast that’s honey-coated and crisp outside, soft and fluffy inside! It’s overloaded with luscious mango cubes, berries and ice cream.
* Pistachio Latte - If you like your iced coffee thick, creamy and sweet, this one’s for you! 

Tag your foodie buddies! 

💸 Approximate spend for 2: 150 AED
📍Dubai Festival City, Ground Floor near Lulu
